The adult female passenger sadly passed away that night from the severe injuries she got when she ejected out of the vehicle due to the crash. Her and the male driver's two children, a one-year-old boy and a five-year-old girl, were treated at a local hospital and released to family members while the male was taken into custody. The male, Augustine Antonio Tompkins, was charged with aggravated homicide by a vehicle, aggravated vehicular assault, failure to comply, driving under the influence, and child endangerment. This incident occurred on July 1st, 2022, and took place in Solon, Ohio. Four months later, in November of 2022, he pleaded guilty to all charges in Cuyahoga County Court of Common Pleas. He would be sentenced a few days later, where he spoke about his actions.
